name: Codsiga Shaabada laabta Daahsoon
description: Ku xidhida boogta feedhaha ee nuugista ah (pneumothorax furan) oo leh shaabad laabta laga soo saaray si looga hortago in hawada soo gasho iyada oo ogolaanaysa in cadaadiska la sii daayo.
steps: Soo bandhig nabarka -- jar ama ka saar dharka.
Masixi maqaarka ku wareegsan nabarka sida engegan ee suurtogalka ah (dhiig, dhididka ayaa ka hortagaya isku dhejinta).
Fur baakadda daboolka laabta ee hawada laga saaray.
Shaabadda dul saar nabarka, adigoo dul saaran daloolka. Si adag u cadaadi, adoo hubinaya in dhammaan cidhifyada ay ku dheggan yihiin.
Hubi jihada valve -- hawadu waa inay u jeeddaa dibadda (ka fog maqaarka) oo ay ahaato mid aan xannibnayn.
Dib u qiimee dhawaaqa neefta. Haddii xumaantu sii socoto xiritaanka ka dib, tixgeli pneumothorax kacsan - samee NCD.
Haddii shaabad la sii daayay la waayo, shaabad aan hawada lahayn ayaa la isticmaali karaa laakiin waa in lala socdo horumarka pneumothorax kacsanaanta.
warnings: Shaabadihii aan hawada lahayni waxay u rogi karaan pneumothorax fudud una beddelaan pneumothorax kacsan -- isticmaal shaabadihii hawada laga saaray oo keliya garoonka dhexdiisa.
Wax duubista saddex-geesood ah (shaabbad la hagaajiyay) kuma talinayso CoTCCC -- isticmaal shaabadda laabta laga soo daayay ee ganacsiga.
Had iyo jeer shaabad mari galka iyo ka bixida boogaha.
